title: Create SubItem Update via API
excerpt:
Hello, 
I am working on an API integration where I am using the API to create subItems and I need to add an update to one of the sub items. Is this possible via the API?

posts.author: nsheetz86 (Nick Sheetz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I am working on an API integration where I am using the API to create subItems and I need to add an update to one of the sub items. Is this possible via the API?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@nsheetz86

Yes. See API documentation: Updates (monday.com).
